Review_Text: Absolutely fantastic smartwatch! Battery lasts for days.
Screen scratched on day one. Terrible build quality.
Good fitness tracking but the app is a bit clunky.
It tells the time. Heart rate monitor is inaccurate.
Love the sleek design and the notifications work perfectly.
Disconnects from my phone constantly. Very frustrating.
Battery died after 3 months. Won't charge anymore.
Great value for the price. Screen is bright.
Best purchase I've made this year. Highly recommend!
